description_long: This is a rustic wooden storage box constructed from weathered horizontal planks, reinforced at the corners with vertical metal brackets that show signs of rust and age. The wood is rough and uneven, with visible grain, knots, and a faded, partially legible stenciled label on the front panel. The box features a semi-circular cutout handle on the front for easy lifting, and the interior is open and unlined, revealing the same aged wood as the exterior. The overall appearance suggests it has been used for heavy-duty storage, possibly in industrial or outdoor urban settings. The box is open-topped, with no visible lid or closure mechanism, and is large enough to hold a variety of items such as tools, bottles, or produce.
description: A weathered wooden storage box with metal corner reinforcements and a front cutout handle, featuring a faded stenciled label. The box is open-topped and has a rugged, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faded stenciled label, semi-circular cutout handle, and metal corner brackets.
description_view_1: Similar to view 0, with the front label and handle clearly visible, highlighting the wood grain and metal brackets.
description_view_2: Another front-facing view, emphasizing the texture of the wood and the open interior.
description_view_3: Front view again, showing the same features: label, handle cutout, and metal reinforcements.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: faded stenciled label on front panel
